sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 327 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.11.2025 Ms. Aiman, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Immad Qamar, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2020 without any progress. Notice was ordered on the last date, however, the matter remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
